headline: PPR Public Housing Maintenance Crisis Affects 280,000
context: PPR complexes housing 280,000 across 120 blocks reported severe maintenance failures including broken lifts and water leaks.

cards.big: 120 PPR blocks with 280,000 residents face severe maintenance failures
cards.sub: Broken lifts water damage and pest infestations affect poorest communities

cards.big: 48% of PPR lifts in KL non-functional for more than 30 days in 2025
cards.sub: Elderly in 18-storey blocks reported being unable to leave homes for weeks

cards.big: Maintenance budget per PPR unit is RM45 monthly versus RM180 for private condos
cards.sub: Government collects only RM124 monthly rent from PPR tenants

cards.big: Rat infestations documented in 85 of 120 surveyed PPR blocks in Klang Valley
cards.sub: KKM linked 3 leptospirosis deaths in 2025 to PPR sanitation conditions

cards.big: PPR decay tests whether public housing maintenance gets proportional investment
280,000 residents in PPR housing face a maintenance crisis that erodes the promise of public shelter.
